zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Saint Maur於1402年7月23日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur28歲，母親Mary Peyvre20歲。她和Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth至少有3個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於大約1491年在英國享年90歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾奧可奧福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Saint Maur于1402年7月23日出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur28岁，母亲Mary Peyvre20岁。她和Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth至少有3个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于大约1491年在英国享年90岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾奧可奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Maur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ernesto, Ramon, Adela, Carlos, Eladio, Emilia, Estrella, Horacio, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Mario.  Italian Alessandra, Angelo, Cecilio, Cosimo, Gianfranco, Lorenzo, Mauro.
Catalan: from the personal name Mauri, Latin Maurus (see Mauro ).
Catalan and French (Occitan): probably from the personal name Malric (ancient Germanic Almaricus).

variants.name: Mauro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Domenic, Giuseppe, Antonio, Carmine, Carmelo, Domenico, Gaetano, Nino, Pasquale.

Italian (mainly southern): from the personal name Mauro, derived from the Latin personal and ethnic name Maurus, borne by various early Christian saints and meaning ‘Moor, North African’. Compare Moore and Moro .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Saint Maur was born on 23 July 1402, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur, was 28 and her mother, Mary Peyvre, was 20. She had at least 3 sons and 7 daughters with Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth. She died about 1491, in England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Okeover, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Saint Maur est née le 23 juillet 1402, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Peyvre, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles avec Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth. Elle est décédée environ 1491, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Okeover, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.Dunham on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: Dunham on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Saint Maur am 23. Juli 1402 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur 28 und ihre Mutter Mary Peyvre 20. Sie hatte mit Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 1491 im Alter von 90 Jahren in England und wurde in Okeover, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Saint Maur è nata il il 23 luglio 1402 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mary Peyvre, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie con Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth. Morì circa 1491, nel England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Okeover, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Saint Maurが1402年7月23日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maurは28歳，母Mary Peyvreは20歳であった。彼女はWillem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworthとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1491年にイギリスで90歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアオケオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Saint Maur(이)가 1402년 7월 23일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Peyvre(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1491년 영국에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 오케오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Saint Maur nasceu em 23 de julho de 1402, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Peyvre, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas com Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1491, em Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Okeover, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Dunham on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: дунам он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Saint Maur родилась 23 июля 1402 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Saint Maur 6th Baron St Maur было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Peyvre, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей от Willem Lord La Zouche van Haryngworth. Она умерла около 1491 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности океовир, стаффордшир, Англия.
